pull.title: Enable `-natpmp` by default
pull.body: This turns the default for NAT hole-punching (with [PCP](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Port_Control_Protocol) or [NAT-PMP](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/NAT_Port_Mapping_Protocol)) to on. Closes #31663.

events.message: mapport: turn -natpmp to on by default
Add release notes for -natpmp enabled by default
